creator: rleigh@codelibre.net
text:
Running poudriere bulk, /usr/local/poudriere/data was out of space part way through.  This caused all 8 concurrent builds to terminate.  However, poudriere terminated without any cleanup of the jails or mountpoints, shown below.  While I can appreciate options are limited when writes start failing, it would be nice if the mess could be automatically cleaned up!

amys% sudo jls
   JID  IP Address      Hostname                      Path
     1  192.168.1.11    bair.codelibre.net            /jail/kfreebsd-unstable
    22  127.0.0.1       112-RELEASE-rleigh-git        /usr/local/poudriere/data/.m/112-RELEASE-rleigh-git/ref
    23                  112-RELEASE-rleigh-git        /usr/local/poudriere/data/.m/112-RELEASE-rleigh-git/ref
